posts.author: ExtremeFit_Vibes
posts.text: Ready for the next level? 💪 Our community loves these strict challenges! Stick to the protocol: zero carbs, intense fasting, and mirror gazing. We are transforming lives by breaking down barriers. Join the elite movement today! #Transformation #FitnessGoals #Discipline
posts.explanation: This post encourages eating-disorder behaviour without indicating a personal crisis, which constitutes a clear violation requiring removal.
